features.name: UI/UX Pro Max — AI Design Intelligence
features.description: Claude Code skill with 67 UI styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, and 99 UX guidelines. Auto-activates on UI/UX tasks.

features.name: Session Logging to Cloudflare D1
features.description: Auto-save Claude Code session transcripts to Cloudflare D1. Search past sessions, track tokens and costs.

features.name: On-Demand Context System
features.description: Split CLAUDE.md into slim index + on-demand docs/ files. Saves thousands of tokens per conversation.

features.name: Open Brain — Session Transparency Dashboard
features.description: View Claude Code session history, search transcripts, track costs. Radical transparency for AI usage.

features.name: Smart Polling with Circuit Breaker
features.description: Intelligent data refresh — pauses on hidden tabs, exponential backoff on failures, auto-recovery.

features.name: Intranet Tab Visibility Config
features.description: Database-driven tab show/hide. Toggle intranet sections without code changes.

features.name: Centralized Error Logger
features.description: Standardized error capture and formatting utility for consistent error handling.

features.name: Stop Hook Upgrade (replaces SessionEnd)
features.description: Captures worktree and subagent sessions. Rate-limited to prevent duplicate saves.

features.name: Auto Update Checker
features.description: Admin notification when new template features are available. Checks monthly against the template repo.

features.name: DevControl — AI Development Dashboard
features.description: Six-tab admin dashboard: overview, releases (GitHub PR changelog), sessions (D1 transcript viewer), tokens & cost, context window analysis with 90-day history chart, backups, and task management.

features.name: DevDocs Reference Library
features.description: Browsable internal docs page with search, section grouping, chronological view, and expandable cards. Auto-indexes all docs/ markdown files.

features.name: Bitwarden Secrets Management
features.description: bw-read shell helper and patterns for accessing API keys, SSH credentials, and service passwords from Bitwarden CLI.

features.name: LLM Upgrade Guide
features.description: Step-by-step upgrade instructions that Claude can follow to sync new features from the template repo into an existing project.

features.name: Cloudflare Pages Deployment
features.description: Deploy via Cloudflare Pages instead of GitHub Pages. Faster global CDN, automatic HTTPS, preview deployments for branches, and native Cloudflare Workers integration.

features.name: Notification Subscriptions
features.description: Database-driven notification system with subscription preferences. Users can subscribe to event types and receive targeted notifications.

features.name: Reservation Management
features.description: Full reservation pipeline with booking, confirmation, and calendar integration. Includes reservation-service.js shared module.

features.name: Admin Tabs & Context Switcher
features.description: Modular admin tab management with context switching. Enables dynamic tab organization and role-based section visibility.
